ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the clothing size (e.g., 0, 2, 4, etc.) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of the size (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the measurements correspond to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches/centimeters */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Natural waist measurement in inches/centimeters */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches/centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement in inches/centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches/centimeters */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Inseam length measurement in inches/centimeters */,
  "hollow_to_hem_knee" TEXT /* Hollow to hem measurement for knee length in inches/centimeters */,
  "hollow_to_hem_floor" TEXT /* Hollow to hem measurement for floor length in inches/centimeters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size association */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity for the specific size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Saved bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Saved waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Saved hip measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Saved shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Saved sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Saved inseam length measurement */,
  "preferred_brand" TEXT /* User's preferred brand */,
  "preferred_color" TEXT /* User's preferred color */,
  "preferred_material" TEXT /* User's preferred material */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size for the clothing item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item being recommended */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score for the size recommendation */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the clothing category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard size */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the size chart */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is the default for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
